title: Delegation of Powers in exercise of powers confer section 13 of JPM Act, 1987
description: Delegation of Powers in exercise of powers confer section 13 of JPM Act, 1987

110001 चीनी, संपूण[ भारत धारा 6, 7 और 8 6. भारत के सभी िजलɉ के ͫ डिèĚक मिजèĚे ट चीनी, संबंͬ धत िजला धारा 6, 7 और 8 7. भारत के सभी िजलɉ के सभी उप-मंडल के उप-मंडल मिजèĚेट चीनी, संबंͬ धत उप-मंडल धारा 6, 7 और 8 [फा. सं. 9/24/2010 –पटसन] सुजीत गुलाटȣ, संयुÈत सͬ चव -- 2 of 3 -- MINISTRY OF TEXTILES ORDER New Delhi, the 30th May, 2011 S.O. 1495 (E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by Section 13 of the Jute Packaging Materials (Compulsory Use in Packing Commodities) Act, 1987 (10 of 1987) and in supersession of the Order of the Government of India in the Ministry of Textiles number S.O. 824(E), dated the 2nd July, 2002 published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part-11, Section 3, Sub-section (ii), dated the 2nd July, 2002, except as respects things done or omitted to be done before such supersession, the Central Government hereby directs that the powers exercisable by it under the provisions of the said Act as specified in column (4) of the following Table shall be exercisable also by the Officers as specified in column (2) of the said table in respect of commodity as specified in column (3) of the aforesaid Table, namely :- TABLE S. No. Designation of Officer Commodity and Jurisdiction Powers delegated (1) (2) (3) (4) 1. Jute Commissioner, Office of the Jute Commissioner Central Government Office Complex, 3rd MSO Building, DF Block, E and F Wing. 4th Floor, Sector-1, Salt Lake City, Kolkata-700064. Foodgrains and Sugar, All over India Section 6, 7 and 8 2. Joint Secretary (Policy) Ministry of Consumer Affairs, Food and Public Distribution, Government of India Krishi Bhawan, New Delhi-110001. Foodgrains and Sugar, All over India Section 6, 7 and 8 3. Sugar, All over India Section 6, 7 and 8 6. District Magistrates of all the Districts in India. Sugar, concerned District Section 6, 7 and 8 7. Sub-Divisional Magistrates of all the Sub- Divisions of all Districts in India. Sugar, concerned Sub- Division Section 6, 7 and 8 [F. No. 9/24/2010-Jute] SUJIT GULATI, Jt. Secy. -- 3 of 3 --
